name: SAGA: Scene-Aware, Goal-Evolving Agents for Long-Horizon Strategy Game Planning

description: arXiv:2606.29932v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Grand-strategy games such as Civilization pose a distinctive long-horizon planning problem: an agent must divide one shared resource pool among six competing domains -- technology, government, diplomacy, city development, expansion, and military -- under partial observability, with no feedback except a delayed final score. author: Tianyu Jin, Shuo Chen, Yida Wang, Liuyu Xiang, Yingzhuo Liu, Yexin Li, Peipei Li, Zhaofeng He
